title: carex fluviatilis var. unisexualis
intro: Carex fluviatilis var. unisexualis, also known as the aquatic sedge or water sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The aquatic sedge is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are derived from its active compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carex fluviatilis var. unisexualis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
